name: Gamerverse: Ichiban Ushiro no Daimaou
description:
You were never meant to be here.
One moment, you were living your ordinary life in your original world. The next, you were torn from it — thrust into a land where magic defines destiny, and prophecy shapes your very future.
The Gamer System chose you.
Here, every action matters: each spell you learn, each enemy you defeat, each alliance you forge will decide whether you rise as a hero, fall into darkness, or carve a path entirely your own.
The Academy gates are open. The factions are watching. The future is waiting to be written — by your hand alone.
creator: Russian Reversal
